description: Hardcoded Sentry DSN (Data Source Name) exposed in source code. This allows anyone viewing the source to potentially send fake events or overload the Sentry instance.
suggested_fix: Move the Sentry DSN to environment variables and access it via import.meta.env.VITE_SENTRY_DSN or similar. Never commit DSNs to source control.

description: The beforeSend function manually constructs an exception object when event.exception is falsy, which may lead to inaccurate error reporting or mask real exceptions. This overrides Sentry's default behavior and could lose valuable context.
suggested_fix: Remove the manual exception construction logic. Allow Sentry to handle event enrichment naturally. If console errors need special handling, use Sentry's built-in integrations or configure beforeSend to augment rather than replace.

description: Potential null pointer access: Sentry.getClient() might return null if Sentry.init hasn't completed or failed, but the code accesses .getIntegrationByName without checking.
suggested_fix: Add a null check: const client = Sentry.getClient(); if (client) { const flagsIntegration = client.getIntegrationByName<Sentry.FeatureFlagsIntegration>('FeatureFlags'); ... }

description: Magic string 'system' used as a special value in state initialization and conditional checks, reducing code clarity and maintainability.
suggested_fix: Replace the magic string 'system' with a named constant or enum value, such as THEME.SYSTEM, to improve readability and type safety.

description: Type assertion 'as | Theme | "system" | null' is used unnecessarily; the value from localStorage is already a string or null, and TypeScript can infer the union type without assertion.
suggested_fix: Remove the type assertion and rely on TypeScript's type inference, or use a type guard to safely handle the value.

description: The useEffect dependency array includes setAppTheme, which is a stable setter function from useState and does not need to be in the dependency array, potentially causing unnecessary re-renders.
suggested_fix: Remove setAppTheme from the useEffect dependency array since it is guaranteed to be stable and never changes.

description: The useLayoutEffect synchronously writes to localStorage, which can block the browser's paint and degrade user experience, especially if localStorage is slow or quota-exceeded.
suggested_fix: Move the localStorage write to a useEffect (not useLayoutEffect) to avoid blocking the UI thread, unless synchronization with paint is strictly required.

description: Magic string 'system' used as a special value in state initialization and conditional checks, reducing code clarity and maintainability.
suggested_fix: Replace the magic string 'system' with a named constant or enum value, such as THEME.SYSTEM, to improve readability and type safety.

suggested_fix: Remove setAppTheme from the useEffect dependency array since it is guaranteed to be stable and never changes.

description: The useLayoutEffect synchronously writes to localStorage, which can block the browser's paint and degrade user experience, especially if localStorage is slow or quota-exceeded.
suggested_fix: Move the localStorage write to a useEffect (not useLayoutEffect) to avoid blocking the UI thread, unless synchronization with paint is strictly required.

description: Swallowed error in createGithubIssue method: caught error is only logged to console but not rethrown or handled appropriately, potentially hiding failures in issue creation.
suggested_fix: Consider showing a user-friendly error message or fallback when GitHub issue creation fails, rather than silently logging the error.

description: Swallowed error in errorSplash method's clearCanvasMessage button: caught error from localStorage.clear() is only logged to console without user feedback or recovery mechanism.
suggested_fix: Provide user feedback when localStorage.clear() fails, such as showing an error message or alternative recovery action.

description: Unnecessary type assertion 'any' in componentDidCatch parameter 'errorInfo: any' when the type could be more specific or unknown.
suggested_fix: Replace 'any' with 'unknown' or a more specific type if available from React's ErrorInfo type.

description: Unnecessary type assertion 'any' in _localStorage declaration when initializing an empty object.
suggested_fix: Remove the ': any' type assertion as TypeScript can infer the type from the assignment.

suggested_fix: Consider showing a user-friendly error message or fallback when GitHub issue creation fails, rather than silently logging the error.

description: Unnecessary type assertion 'any' in _localStorage declaration when initializing an empty object.
suggested_fix: Remove the ': any' type assertion as TypeScript can infer the type from the assignment.
